docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY HAYNES, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT JOS.A. BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYNES, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT JOS.A. BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-20-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOS.A. BANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
